get.description: Initiates the OIDC authorization flow by redirecting the user to the provider's login page.

302.description: Redirect to OAuth provider login page

get.description: Handles the callback from the OIDC provider, exchanges the authorization code for tokens, and redirects to the frontend.

302.description: Redirect to frontend with auth token in fragment

post.description: Creates a new account with email and password and returns an authentication token.
Authenticates with email and password and returns an authentication token.
Verifies a user's email address using the token from the verification email.
Resends the email verification link to the authenticated user.

get.description: Return the currently authenticated user.

put.description: Update the currently authenticated user's profile.

get.description: Return the account for the currently authenticated user.

delete.description: Permanently delete the current account and all associated data.

get.description: List all environments for the authenticated account.

post.description: Create a new environment. The caller provides the id (key) in the request body.

get.description: Return an environment by id.

post.description: Create a new API key. The id and key value are server-generated.

get.description: List all API keys for the authenticated account.
Return an API key by id.

put.description: Update an API key by id.

delete.description: Delete an API key by id.

post.description: Permanently revoke an API key.

get.description: List all context types for the authenticated account.

post.description: Create a new context type. The caller provides the id (key) in the request body.

get.description: Return a context type by id.

put.description: Update a context type by id.

delete.description: Delete a context type and all its associated context instances by id.

post.description: Register context instances in bulk. Creates context types automatically if they don't exist.

get.description: List all context instances for the authenticated account.
Return a context instance by composite id (type:key).

delete.description: Delete a context instance by composite id (type:key).

get.description: List all services for the authenticated account.

post.description: Create a new service. The caller provides the id (key) in the request body.

get.description: Return a service by id.

post.description: Send one or more invitations to join the account.

get.description: List all invitations for the authenticated account.

post.description: Revoke a pending invitation by id.
Resend a pending invitation email by id.
Accept an invitation using a token from the invitation email.

get.description:
Return distinct metric names (with a representative unit) for this account.

Used by the dashboard to discover which product sections to render.
Plain JSON response (not JSON:API) — this is metadata, not a metric resource.

post.description: Ingest pre-aggregated metric data points. Returns 202 Accepted with no response body.

get.description: Query raw metric rows with filtering by name, time range, and dimensions.
Query aggregated metric rollups. Requires filter[rollup] for the aggregation interval.
List users in the authenticated account.
Return a user by id.

put.description: Update a user's role in the account.

delete.description: Remove a user from the account.

get.description: Return all plan tier definitions as JSON:API resources.
Return all products with their plans and limits as JSON:API resources.
Return subscription rows for the authenticated account.

post.description: Create a new paid subscription for a product.
Upgrade an existing paid subscription to a higher plan.
Downgrade an existing paid subscription to a lower plan.
Cancel a subscription at end of the current billing period.

get.description: Return the default payment method for the account's Stripe Customer.
Return invoice history for the account from Stripe.

post.description:
Create a Stripe SetupIntent for saving a payment method.

Returns a ``client_secret`` that the frontend passes to Stripe's
Payment Element so the customer can securely enter card details
without an immediate charge.
